Company_Name: The name of the company the insight relates to.
Project: The project or product the milestone is associated with.
Milestone: A significant stage or event in the development process.
Target_Date: The target date for achieving the specified milestone.
Details: Additional details about the milestone, such as associated tasks or dependencies.
Time_Allowed_for_Validation_Testing: Time in months allocated for validation testing after the milestone has been reached.
Production_Start_Date: The date when full production is expected to begin.
